en: How to get what I want.
Perhaps you should try wanting something else.
If I want jokes, I'll get myself a proper fool.
ko: 농담이 필요하면 제대로 된 광대를 구할게.

en: There's more to the world than Westeros, after all.
How many hundreds of thousands of lives have you changed for the better here?
ko: 여기서 얼마나 많은 수천 수만의 삶을 더 좋게 바꿨니?

en: Perhaps this is where you belong, where you can do the most good.
ko: 아마도 여기서 네가 가장 많은 선을 행할 수 있을 거야.

en: I fought so that no child born into Slaver's Bay would ever know what it meant to be bought or sold.
ko: 나는 슬레이버스 베이에 태어난 아이가 사거나 팔리는 게 어떤 의미인지 알지 못하게 싸웠어.

en: I will continue that fight here and beyond, but this is not my home.
ko: 나는 여기서 그리고 그 너머에서 그 싸움을 계속할 거지만, 이곳은 내 집이 아니야.

en: When you get back to your home, who supports you? The common people.
ko: 집으로 돌아가면 누가 너를 지지해? 평민들이야.

en: Let's be generous and assume that's going to happen.
ko: 관대하게 생각해보자, 그게 일어날 거라고 가정해보자.

en: Here in Slaver's Bay, you had the support of the common people and only the common people.
What was that like, ruling without the rich?
Not a single person who shares your blood.
ko: 너의 피를 나누는 사람은 한 명도 없어.
